audit_items.proof_trace: cache_destroy has no error paths: it is a void function with no early returns, no conditionals that bypass any free, and no internal allocations. All four managed allocations (pool items via the while-loop, cache->name, cache->ptr, cache struct) are freed unconditionally on the single linear execution path. Outstanding items not yet returned via cache_free are explicitly excluded by contract (cache.h documents that callers must return all buffers before calling cache_destroy).
